title: Inscribed quadrilaterals
description: Use the fact that opposite angles in an inscribed quadrilateral are supplementary to solve a few problems.
topic_path: Module 5: Circles with and without coordinates
Topic A: Central and inscribed angles

assessment_items.question_content:
Quadrilateral $WILD$ is inscribed in circle $O$.   
$\overline{WI}$ is a diameter of circle $O$.

**What is the measure of $\angle D$?**  
[[☃ input-number 1]] $^\circ$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/486739b863e8bd869285d1a84fcdef64747f76c0)
hints: The opposite angles in ANY inscribed quadrilateral are supplementary.  [[☃ explanation 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
